en: Do you know how to use this English word?
ko: 이 영어 단어 어떻게 쓰는지 알아?

en: Request it's a noun that means a polite or formal way of asking for something. Here's an example a
ko: Request. 무언가를 정중하게 또는 공식적으로 요청하는 것을 뜻하는 명사야. 예문

en: request a request I have a request I
Have a request I have a request can the sauce be made a dairy-free
Dairy-free sauce That's a wild request. I'll pass it on now
Let's review Say this out loud
Have a request great job follow English class 101 for more English lessons
ko: 요청이 있어요. 잘했어. English class 101을 팔로우해서 더 많은 영어 수업을 들어봐
